creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
The package name and version that get registered in the package db do not
follow the FBSD standard.

The pkgdb utility from the portupgrade package exits with a fatal error upon
encounting the package name.

Fix: 

None yet.
How-To-Repeat: 
1. install the open-motif-devel-2.1.30.tgz package.
2. run pkgdb -F.
